sentences.target: Tu te déguises en fantôme ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ty tə deɡiz ɑ̃ fɑ̃tom sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: Tu te déguises en fantôme ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ty tə deɡiz ɑ̃ fɑ̃tom sə swaʁ/
translations.en: Are you dressing up as a ghost tonight?
translations.es: ¿Te vas a disfrazar de fantasma esta noche?
translations.de: Verkleidest du dich heute Abend als Geist?
translations.ru: Ты сегодня вечером переодеваешься в привидение?
translations.pt: Você vai se fantasiar de fantasma esta noite?
translations.tr: Bu gece hayalet kılığına mı giriyorsun?
translations.vi: Tối nay bạn sẽ hóa trang thành ma à?
translations.nl: Ga je je vanavond als een spook verkleden?
translations.uk: Ти сьогодні ввечері будеш перевдягатися в привида?
translations.hi: क्या तुम आज रात भूत का वेश धारण कर रहे हो?
translations.pl: Przebierasz się dziś wieczorem za ducha?
translations.nb: Kler du deg ut som et spøkelse i kveld?
translations.id: Apakah kamu akan berdandan sebagai hantu malam ini?
translations.sv: Ska du klä ut dig till ett spöke i kväll?
translations.cs: Převlékáš se dnes večer za ducha?
translations.da: Klæder du dig ud som et spøgelse i aften?
translations.ja: 今夜はおばけに仮装するの？

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular subject pronoun; informal; serves as the subject of the clause.
Clitic reflexive pronoun, 2nd person singular; marks the pronominal verb se déguiser and corefers with the subject.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; pronominal use with te meaning ‘to dress (yourself) up’.
Preposition introducing a role/guise complement (‘en fantôme’ = ‘as a ghost’).
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition en denoting the guise.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, modifying soir; forms a temporal expression ‘ce soir’.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the temporal adjunct ‘ce soir’.

sentences.target: On a vu un fantôme au parc.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ a vy œ̃ fɑ̃tom o paʁk/

translations.fr: On a vu un fantôme au parc.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ a vy œ̃ fɑ̃tom o paʁk/
translations.en: We saw a ghost at the park.
translations.es: Vimos un fantasma en el parque.
translations.de: Wir haben im Park einen Geist gesehen.
translations.it: Abbiamo visto un fantasma al parco.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在公园里看到了一个幽灵。
translations.yue: 我哋喺公園見到一個鬼。
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đã thấy một con ma ở công viên.
translations.nl: We zagen een spook in het park.
translations.hi: हमने पार्क में एक भूत देखा.
translations.nb: Vi så et spøkelse i parken.
translations.sv: Vi såg ett spöke i parken.
translations.ro: Am văzut o fantomă în parc.
translations.da: Vi så et spøgelse i parken.

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/personal pronoun used as subject; often corresponds to colloquial ‘we’.
Auxiliary verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; forms the passé composé.
Past participle of the lexical verb; with auxiliary avoir to form perfect (‘a vu’). No agreement since the direct object follows.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of fantôme.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘voir’.
Contraction of the preposition à and the article le; introduces a locative complement (‘au parc’).
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition (head of the PP ‘au parc’).

sentences.target: Ce drap ressemble à un petit fantôme.
sentences.reading: /sə dʁa ʁəsɑ̃bl a œ̃ pəti fɑ̃tom/

translations.fr: Ce drap ressemble à un petit fantôme.
translations.ipa: /sə dʁa ʁəsɑ̃bl a œ̃ pəti fɑ̃tom/
translations.en: This sheet looks like a little ghost.
translations.es: Esta sábana parece un pequeño fantasma.
translations.de: Dieses Laken sieht aus wie ein kleiner Geist.
translations.it: Questo lenzuolo sembra un piccolo fantasma.
translations.zh-Hans: 这条床单看起来像一个小幽灵。
translations.yue: 呢張床單好似一個細鬼。
translations.ru: Эта простыня выглядит как маленькое привидение.
translations.pt: Este lençol parece um pequeno fantasma.
translations.he: הסדין הזה נראה כמו רוח רפאים קטנה.
translations.tr: Bu çarşaf küçük bir hayalete benziyor.
translations.vi: Tấm vải này trông giống một con ma nhỏ.
translations.ar: هذه الملاءة تبدو مثل شبح صغير.
translations.nl: Dit laken ziet eruit als een klein spook.
translations.uk: Це простирадло виглядає як маленький привид.
translations.hu: Ez a lepedő úgy néz ki, mint egy kis szellem.
translations.hi: यह चादर एक छोटे भूत जैसी दिखती है.
translations.pl: To prześcieradło wygląda jak mały duch.
translations.el: Αυτό το σεντόνι μοιάζει με ένα μικρό φάντασμα.
translations.nb: Dette lakenet ser ut som et lite spøkelse.
translations.id: Seprai ini terlihat seperti hantu kecil.
translations.sv: Det här lakanet ser ut som ett litet spöke.
translations.ro: Acest cearșaf arată ca o fantomă mică.
translations.cs: Tohle prostěradlo vypadá jako malý duch.
translations.da: Dette lagen ligner et lille spøgelse.
translations.ja: このシーツは小さなおばけみたいだ。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies drap.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes a prepositional complement with à.
Preposition selecting the complement of ressembler (‘ressembler à’).
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of the NP ‘petit fantôme’.
Attributive adjective, masculine singular; pre-nominal modifier agreeing with fantôme.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition à.

sentences.target: C'est un fantôme du dessin animé.

translations.fr: C'est un fantôme du dessin animé.
translations.en: It's a ghost from the cartoon.
translations.es: Es un fantasma del dibujo animado.
translations.de: Das ist ein Geist aus dem Zeichentrickfilm.
translations.it: È un fantasma del cartone animato.
translations.pt: É um fantasma do desenho animado.
translations.vi: Đó là một con ma trong phim hoạt hình.
translations.nl: Het is een spook uit de tekenfilm.
translations.el: Είναι ένα φάντασμα από τα κινούμενα σχέδια.
translations.nb: Det er et spøkelse fra tegnefilmen.
translations.sv: Det är ett spöke från tecknad film.
translations.ro: Este o fantomă din desenele animate.
translations.cs: Je to duch z kresleného filmu.
translations.da: Det er et spøgelse fra tegnefilmen.
translations.ja: それはアニメに出てくるおばけだ。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun ‘ce’ elided before a vowel; subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular; links the subject to the predicate nominal.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of fantôme.
Common noun, masculine singular; predicate nominal of the copula.
Contraction of de and le; introduces a noun complement (‘du dessin animé’).
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the compound expression ‘dessin animé’ (‘cartoon’).
Adjective (past participle used adjectivally) modifying dessin; together ‘dessin animé’ forms a fixed expression meaning ‘cartoon’.

hu: Ez a lepedő úgy néz ki, mint egy kis szellem.

हमने पार्क में एक भूत देखा.

Acest cearșaf arată ca o fantomă mică.
Este o fantomă din desenele animate.
cs: Převlékáš se dnes večer za ducha?
Tohle prostěradlo vypadá jako malý duch.
Je to duch z kresleného filmu.

Vi så et spøgelse i parken.
Dette lagen ligner et lille spøgelse.
Det er et spøgelse fra tegnefilmen.
